title: Qiagen RNEasy PowerMicrobiome RNA Extraction Protocol
author: Michael Dan Siemon
materials: Qiagen RNEasy PowerMicrobiome RNA extraction kit

steps.title: As a substitute for vortexing described...
steps.instruction: As a substitute for vortexing described in the kit protocol, bead-beating was used. Bead-beating was conducted 4x for 30s at 4 m/s.

steps.title: Add 100 µl phenol–chloroform–isoamyl alcohol to...
steps.instruction: Add 100 µl phenol–chloroform–isoamyl alcohol to a PowerBead Bead Tube, Glass 0.1 mm. Place 0.25 g stool or biosolid sample into the Bead Tube.

steps.title: Thoroughly mix wastewater sample then aliquot...
steps.instruction: Thoroughly mix wastewater sample then aliquot 40 mL into 50 mL Falcon tube. Centrifuge at 4500 x g for 20 min. Decant supernatant, assume 280 µl pellet.

steps.title: After pelletizing the samples with centrifugation...
steps.instruction: After pelletizing the samples with centrifugation (13,000 x g for 1 min), mix the supernatant with 650 µl each of Solution PM3 and Solution PM4.

steps.title: Add 650 µl PM1 and 6
steps.instruction: Add 650 µl PM1 and 6.5 µl β-mercaptoethanol to the PowerBead Tube

steps.title: Incubate spin columns with DNase Digestion...
steps.instruction: Incubate spin columns with DNase Digestion Solution for 15 minutes at room temperature to isolate only RNA.

steps.title: Process the solution through MB RNA...
steps.instruction: Process the solution through MB RNA Spin Column by centrifugation (13,000 x g for 1 min). Discard flow-through and repeat until all the solution has been processed.

steps.title: Shake solution PM5, add 650 µl...
steps.instruction: Shake solution PM5, add 650 µl to the Spin Column and centrifuge (13,000 x g for 1 min).

steps.title: Conduct a drying step by centrifuging...
steps.instruction: Conduct a drying step by centrifuging at 13,000 x g for 1 min to remove residual wash.

steps.title: Elute RNA from the spin columns into 1
steps.instruction: Elute RNA from the spin columns into 1.5 ml eppendorf tubes by passing 50 uL of DEPC water through twice. Centrifuge each elution 13,000 x g for 1 min.

steps.title: Discard flow-through
steps.instruction: Discard flow-through. Add 650 µl Solution PM5. Centrifuge at 13,000 x g for 1 min.

steps.title: Discard flow-through
steps.instruction: Discard flow-through. Add 650 µl Solution PM4. Centrifuge at 13,000 x g for 1 min.

steps.title: Add 400 µl Solution PM7 and...
steps.instruction: Add 400 µl Solution PM7 and centrifuge at 13,000 x g for 1 min.

steps.title: Conduct a drying step by centrifuging...
steps.instruction: Conduct a drying step by centrifuging at 13,000 x g for 2 min.

steps.title: After pelletizing the samples with centrifugation...
steps.instruction: After pelletizing the samples with centrifugation (13,000 x g for 1 min), mix the supernatant with 150 µl Inhibitor Removal Solution in a new collection tube and vortex briefly to mix. Incubate at 2–8°C for 5 min.
